tasks.command: mkdir -Force .reports; uv run --with ruff ruff check --config pyproject.toml --exit-zero . | tee .reports/ruff_lint.txt; Write-Host; if (Select-String -Quiet 'All checks passed' .reports/ruff_lint.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host '✔  Ruff Lint: PASSED' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host '✖  Ruff Lint: FAILED' -ForegroundColor Red }
tasks.label: Validate: Ruff Lint

tasks.command: mkdir -Force .reports; uv run --with ruff ruff format --config pyproject.toml --check . | tee .reports/ruff_format_status.txt; $ec = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Host; if ($ec -eq 0) { Write-Host '✔  Ruff Format: PASSED' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host '✖  Ruff Format: FAILED' -ForegroundColor Red }; exit 0
tasks.label: Validate: Ruff Format Check

tasks.command: mkdir -Force .reports; npx prettier --config .validate/.prettierrc.json --ignore-path .validate/.prettierignore --check '**/*.md' '**/*.json' '**/*.yaml' '!.validate/**' '!node_modules/**' | tee .reports/prettier_check.txt; Write-Host; if (Select-String -Quiet 'Prettier code style' .reports/prettier_check.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Write-Host '✔  Prettier: PASSED' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host '✖  Prettier: FAILED' -ForegroundColor Red }; exit 0
tasks.label: Validate: Prettier Check

tasks.command: mkdir -Force .reports; npx --package=markdownlint-cli markdownlint --config .validate/.markdownlint.json --ignore-path .gitignore '**/*.md' 2>&1 | tee .reports/markdown_lint.txt; $ec = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Host; if ($ec -eq 0) { Write-Host '✔  Markdown Lint: PASSED' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host '✖  Markdown Lint: FAILED' -ForegroundColor Red }; exit 0
tasks.label: Validate: Markdown Style

tasks.command: mkdir -Force .reports; uv run --with yamllint yamllint -c .validate/.yamllint . | tee .reports/yaml_lint.txt; $ec = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Host; if ($ec -eq 0) { Write-Host '✔  YAML Lint: PASSED' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host '✖  YAML Lint: FAILED' -ForegroundColor Red }; exit 0
tasks.label: Validate: YAML Style

tasks.command: mkdir -Force .reports; uv run --with codespell codespell . | tee .reports/codespell.txt; $ec = $LASTEXITCODE; Write-Host; if ($ec -eq 0) { Write-Host '✔  Codespell: PASSED' -ForegroundColor Green } else { Write-Host '✖  Codespell: FAILED' -ForegroundColor Red }; exit 0
tasks.label: Validate: Codespell

tasks.command: mkdir -Force .reports; if (Test-Path .github) { uv run --with zizmor zizmor --pedantic .github/ | tee .reports/zizmor_audit.txt } else { Set-Content .reports/zizmor_audit.txt 'Skipped: no .github/ workflows'; Write-Host 'Skipped: no .github/ workflows' -ForegroundColor Yellow }; exit 0
tasks.label: Validate: Zizmor

tasks.command: uv run --with ruff ruff check --config pyproject.toml --fix .; exit 0
tasks.label: Format: Apply Ruff Lint Fix

tasks.command: uv run --with ruff ruff format --config pyproject.toml .; exit 0
tasks.label: Format: Apply Ruff Format
